objective: Implement one independently authored finite IPv4-loopback String runtime for exactly one channel and one caller record, a nonempty payload of at most 127 UTF-8 bytes, the two LSLC-003Q-observed initialization records, and observed one-byte length form.
non_scope: Empty or >127-byte Strings, multiple channels or caller records, arbitrary length forms, chunks, int64, numeric changes, non-loopback networking, discovery changes, queueing, recovery, clock algorithms, or broad compatibility.

Feature activation, new runtime authority, devices, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, official or rLSL source, copied/translated source, private raw publication, commands derived from samples, or Manifold authority.

acceptance.proof: One nonempty <=127-byte UTF-8 String preserves exact bytes and timestamp through the observed initialization and length form in finite loopback directions.
Empty/oversized/invalid UTF-8, wrong initialization, malformed length form/count, truncation, marker, cancellation, deadline, I/O, handshake, and cleanup are typed and atomic.
Runtime, focused tests, fixture, provenance, routes, and limitations remain exactly bound to LSLC-003Q.
Policy, public boundary, instruction synchronization, and workflow contracts pass without activation or authority drift.

outputs: A closed public String record, limits, activation composition, and finite inlet/outlet functions for exactly one channel and one caller record.
Typed bounds, UTF-8, initialization, length, marker, truncation, cancellation, deadline, I/O, handshake, and cleanup evidence.
A sanitized implementation fixture and policy-owned focused validator bound to LSLC-003Q.
commit_policy: Commit proposal/lifecycle separately; implement only exact paths; publish no private driver/raw/endpoint data; preserve failed attempts.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Bound the exact String runtime and exclusions.
Route selected run-disabled bounded String runtime.
Describe closed runtime composition and authority boundary.
Separate implemented bounded behavior from observation and excluded breadth.
Bind implementation inputs to independent code and sanitized observation.
Route focused runtime through sole policy.
Existing LSL ownership and activation routing applies.
Existing closed activation, evidence, and authority guidance applies.
